checkpoint_policy: temporary file plus fsync plus atomic no-overwrite hard-link publish
output_policy: absent-or-empty attempt only; atomic claim; completed tree read-only
run_real_star_signature: (config: star_eeg.training.real_star_runner.RealStarConfig, repo_root: pathlib.Path, immutable_manifest_path: pathlib.Path, immutable_go_nogo_path: pathlib.Path, anchor_manifest_path: pathlib.Path, shuffled_manifest_path: pathlib.Path, faced_lmdb_path: pathlib.Path, contract_dir: pathlib.Path, runtime_output_dir: pathlib.Path, device_name: str, attempt_id: str, launch_approval_path: Optional[pathlib.Path] = None) -> Dict[str, object]
telemetry_policy: one canonical JSON row per optimizer step; append, flush, fsync
